title: Shanghai Jiao Tong University AI Policy Crawl Report - May 2026
summary: Crawled three official Shanghai Jiao Tong University Chinese-language PDF sources about AI in education and teaching. Staged claims cover the four-tier AI application classification, teacher responsibility for AI+ teaching design, student compliance with course AI-use and academic-integrity requirements, and Article 5 AI+ education principles. Claims are staged as agent-reviewed evidence records and are not canonical facts until published through the tracker release workflow.
limitations: This report is based on official Chinese-language SJTU PDF sources available on 2026-05-11.
The main 2025 AI usage norms are marked as trial version (试行版) and may be revised.
No official English policy equivalent was included in this crawl.
Claims are staged artifacts reviewed by an agent, not human-reviewed canonical tracker facts.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement.
sourceRightsPolicy: Official source pages/PDFs retain their original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
